headline: Trump 🍊👑 Gets THICC Xi Welcome 🏛️😍 But Taiwan Thorn 😈🔥
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 BAD BOY Trump DROPS into Beijing 🏰🇨🇳 for SUPERPOWER SMILE-OFF 😁📸 with XI DADDY 👑🐉 throwing RED CARPET ORGY 💃🧧! Military HONOR GUARD 💂‍♂️🔫 SALUTING like fanboys, BAND blasting STAR-SPANGLED BANGER 🎺🇺🇸 while schoolkids WAVE FLAGS 🏳️🇺🇸🇨🇳 like K-POP STANS 😍👏! Trump LEANS IN 🤝💕 PATS Xi's ARM like bro-hug, SPILLS 'YOU'RE A GREAT LEADER 🥇👑 I TELL EVERYBODY!' – UNSCRIPTED SIMP MODE ACTIVATED 😂💦! Temple of Heaven TOUR 🛕😇? 'CHINA'S BEAUTIFUL AF 🌸🍑!' Banquet NIGHT? CALLS TALKS 'CHERISHED' 💕🍽️ – WHO IS THIS GUY?!?

REMEMBER 2016 RALLY RAGE? 'CHINA RAPING USA 💔🍆 THEY'RE RIPPING US OFF 😡!' 2020 'CHINESE VIRUS' BOMBS 💣🦠, VOWED 'MAKE CHINA PAY 💸🔪!' TRADE WAR TARIFFS OVER 100% ⚔️💥 – FRAGILE TRUCE NOW? 🤔❓ Iran DEAL? 🛢️🇮🇷 Taiwan TENSION? 🏝️🚫 Beijing FLATTERS Trump with SPECTACLE 🎭📺 to PROVE DOORS OPEN 🚪💨, but Xi STATE MEDIA SPILLS 'TAIWAN = CONFLICT ZONE ⚠️💥!' SHOW OF STRENGTH for USA + WORLD AUDIENCE 👀🌍 – JOHN DELURY DROPS 'CHINA RISING TO #2 CAPITAL 🥈🏙️ HISTORICAL FLEX!'

Xi POSING as STABLE DADDY 👨‍💼🧘 vs MERCURIAL Trump 🤪🌪️ – CANUCKS 🇨🇦, LIMEYS 🇬🇧, GERMANS 🇩🇪 ALL SIMPING for DEALS 💰🤝! China TRADE BOOMED 📈🚀 post-Trump threats, FLEXED TIT-FOR-TAT TARIFFS 🧂⚔️ + RARE EARTH CHOKEHOLD ⛏️🚫 (90% WORLD SUPPLY 🤯!) – NOW MAKES 1/3 GOODS 🏭🌍, 60-80% SOLAR/WIND/EVS ☀️🌪️🚗! HR CONCERNS? MOSCOW/PYONGYANG BROS? 👻🇷🇺🇰🇵 SHADOWED by Trump SHAKE-UP 🌋!

China UPPER HAND 💪 cuz Trump WEAKENED by IRAN WAR 💥🇮🇷 – STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKED 🚢⛔ rattling GLOBAL ECO 😱💸! Rubio on FOX 📺🦊: 'CHINA WANNA FIX IT 🛠️ PLAY BALL!' Beijing-Tehran BFFs 💕🇨🇳🇮🇷 – Xi NUDGES? GETS LEVERAGE 🍆! But Taiwan ARMS? 🏝️🔫 'STOP SALES OR BOOM ⚡!' Leaders DODGE Qs at Temple 🤐🛕 – TAIPEI SWEATING 😰💦!

NO MELANIA THIS TIME 👩‍🍼🚫 – BUSINESS SIMPS STEAL SHOW: ELON MUSK 🚀🐦, TIM COOK 🍎😎, NVDA JENSEN HUANG 🕶️🔥 CHIPS DADDY all at BANQUET 🥂👑! Trump PUSHES 'OPEN DOORS FOR US FIRMS 🚪💰!' WHITE HOUSE VAGUE: 'ECON COOP 💼🤝, NO NUKES FOR IRAN ☢️🚫, HORMUZ FREE FLOW 🛢️💨!' FRIDAY ROUND 2 ❓ – Trump NEEDS WIN cuz RATINGS TANKING 📉😩! Xi SIGNALS SOY/BEEF/BOEING BUYS 🌱🥩✈️ – 'CONSTRUCTIVE STABLE BROS 👬🕊️' for 3 YRS!

China HURTING from UNEMPLOYMENT 😭📈, REAL ESTATE CRASH 🏠💥, DEBT MOUNTAIN 🏔️💸 – NEEDS USA GET-ALONG 🫂! Banquet TOAST 🥂: Trump BASKS 'MAGNIFICENT WELCOME 👏🌟!' INVITES Xi TO WHITE HOUSE 🏛️🍊 SEPT! Xi GOES HARD: 'CHINA REJUV + MAGA HAND-IN-HAND ✊🇨🇳🇺🇸!' CHEERS TO FUTURE 🍻😍 – THORNY ISSUES LURK but TODAY'S ALL SMILES 😁📸‼️
